Zombie Night Terror

Command your zombie horde through dangerous facilities! Your zombies walk automatically, but you must strategically mutate them to overcome obstacles and defenses. Convert all humans to grow your horde, destroy barriers with exploders, and reach the exit. Manage your mutation points wisely—they're earned by infecting humans. Fail if all zombies die or critical humans escape!

Arrow Left/Right: Move camera view left/right | Number Keys 1-5: Select mutation type | Space: Apply selected mutation | Z: Quick-select Blocker | Shift: Speed up time | Enter: Start | Esc: Pause | R: Restart
